comments: Tommy refers to Ozzy as 'Oswald' Osbourne in the first part of the programme
Then discloses he has four tickets for the upcoming Ozzy Hammersmith Odeon show in the seventh row. Wonder who the other lucky three attendees were??
Tommy is enthusiastic about the Pendragon session describing it as 'really good'.
A couple of technical difficulties as first the Status Quo track is played initially at the wrong speed, then the first Free track refuses to play at all, and is swapped for Quiet Riot.
At the end of the show Tommy says he's "off to Radio London" possibly to drink "half a bottle of wine" at a charity event!

sessions.artist: Pendragon (first broadcast) recorded 11 November 1983 produced by Tony Wilson and Dave Dade
sessions.details: Nick Barrett (guitar/vox), Nigel Harris (drums), Peter Gee (bass), John Barnfield (keyboard)
(Archive set) recorded 4 June 1970 "we think" (actually 2 April 1970) and 19 April 1971
